heading: Medal of honor: presentation of Medal of Honor Flag
label: 9285 Medal of honor: presentation of Medal of Honor Flag
text: The President shall provide for the presentation of the Medal of Honor Flag designated under to each person to whom a medal of honor is awarded under . Presentation of the flag shall be made at the same time as the presentation of the medal under section 9271 or 9282(a) of this title. In the case of a posthumous presentation of the medal, the flag shall be presented to the person to whom the medal is presented.section 903 of title 36section 9271 of this title

Presentation of Flag for Prior Recipients of Medal of HonorPresident to provide for the presentation of the Medal of Honor Flag to living recipients of the Medal of Honor as expeditiously as possible after , and for posthumous presentation to survivors of deceased recipients upon written application therefor, see , set out as a note under .Oct. 17, 2006section 555(b) of Pub.
